# SamplingValidation.IsValidPriority method

Returns `true` when *priority* is absent or a finite number in 0..1 inclusive (R-21.2.9-e).

```csharp
public static bool IsValidPriority(double? priority)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| priority | The priority weight, or `null`. |

## Return Value

`true` when in range (or absent).
